sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47818" key="qalpth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θαλπ-τήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">warming</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάνδαλα . . ποδῶν θ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.206.1</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.
